summary: Retest of iter_8 minor fixes: (1) POST /api/prompts/generate now returns system_prompt containing 'antifluido', no 'impermeable', 'FLUJO' structure text, length>=900 chars OR flujo markers, and at least one {var} placeholder — PASSED. (2) /app/prompts editor preview header explicitly states 'María · Servientrega · Medellín · guía SGT-987' AND the rendered prompt-preview-system substitutes all 4 tokens — PASSED. Full pytest suite 16/16 green, no regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: Optional cleanup: /app/backend/tests/test_dropi_import.py cannot be collected (ModuleNotFoundError: dropi_import) — same pre-existing state as iter_8; not in retest scope but worth adding conftest sys.path adjustment or renaming import.
seed_data_creation: TEST_Sofia Servientrega campaign prompt created & deleted in CRUD test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter_9 closes both iter_8 minors. Generate endpoint returned model_used with valid content on live LLM call (all 5 assertions: antifluido present, impermeable absent, FLUJO present, length>=900 or flujo markers, at least one {var} placeholder). Frontend preview correctly substitutes María/Servientrega/Medellín/SGT-987 in rendered prompt-preview-system. All 16 pytest tests pass (Prompts CRUD+resolve+generate, Telnyx config/register guardrail, WA rules CRUD+resolve including days_left=999 edge, WA templates proxy, products.match promo regression).
